esp32_usb_soft_host_begin.message0: ESP32 USB Soft Host begin D+0 %1 D-0 %2 D+1 %3 D-1 %4 D+2 %5 D-2 %6 D+3 %7 D-3 %8
esp32_usb_soft_host_begin.tooltip: Initialize the software USB host with up to four D+/D- GPIO pairs. Use -1 to disable an unused port.

esp32_usb_soft_host_task_options.message0: USB Soft Host task core %1 priority %2 blink pin %3 interrupt %4
esp32_usb_soft_host_task_options.tooltip: Configure task core, priority, activity LED pin, and interrupt allocation flag before initialization.

esp32_usb_soft_host_descriptor_log.message0: USB Soft Host enable descriptor log
esp32_usb_soft_host_descriptor_log.tooltip: Attach the library default descriptor callbacks to print USB configuration, interface, HID, and endpoint descriptors.

esp32_usb_soft_host_on_detect.message0: when USB device detected port %1 vendor %2 product %3 class %4 %5 %6
esp32_usb_soft_host_on_detect.tooltip: Register a callback that runs when the software USB host detects a device.

esp32_usb_soft_host_on_disconnect.tooltip: Register a callback that runs when a USB device disconnects.

esp32_usb_soft_host_on_data.message0: when USB data received port %1 length %2 hex %3 %4 %5
esp32_usb_soft_host_on_data.tooltip: Register a callback that runs when HID report bytes arrive. The last report is also available through value blocks.

esp32_usb_soft_host_on_tick.tooltip: Register a callback called from the USB host timer task.

esp32_usb_soft_host_timer.tooltip: Pause or resume the USB soft-host timer around timing-sensitive filesystem or flash work.

esp32_usb_soft_host_last_value.tooltip: Read a numeric value from the most recent USB event.

esp32_usb_soft_host_last_data_hex.message0: USB Soft Host last data hex
esp32_usb_soft_host_last_data_hex.tooltip: Read the latest HID report bytes as a space-separated hexadecimal string.

esp32_usb_soft_host_data_byte.message0: USB Soft Host data byte index %1
esp32_usb_soft_host_data_byte.tooltip: Read one byte from the latest HID report buffer. Index starts at 0.
